name: Black Bottom Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients for the crumbs in a bowl. Using a pastry blender or your hands, work in the shortening until the mixture is like coarse crumbs.
2. For the liquid part, dissolve the baking soda in the boiling water. Add molasses and egg yolk to this mixture.
3. Fill the unbaked pie shell with alternate layers of the liquid part and crumbs, ending with crumbs on top.
4. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit until the edges start to brown (about 10-15 minutes).
5. Reduce the temperature to 325 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for about 20 more minutes or until firm.
